message:
feat(fcp-host): add log redaction module for secret-safe output

Add Redacted<T> wrapper that hides values from Debug/Display,
RedactionPolicy for configurable field name matching, and
redact_json() for recursive JSON value sanitization. Addresses
oip0 checklist item "Host never logs secrets".

26 new tests, 1511 total fcp-host lib tests, all clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
